overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic neon-lit city at night during heavy rain. The player accelerates through wet streets surrounded by towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and cyberpunk architecture, transitioning from commercial districts to industrial areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk commercial street with dense neon signage

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stationary position, speedometer climbing from 01
passing under intense green neon signs illuminating the wet street

agents.ego_description: accelerating through narrow wet city streets, navigating between close-proximity skyscrapers with green neon reflections on the windshield

entered.detail: illuminated control panel with digital speedometer showing purple and white accents
tall dark buildings with illuminated windows and green neon accents lining the street
glowing green commercial advertisements mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle at night in a heavy downpour. The player accelerates through a narrow cyberpunk street canyon surrounded by towering glass buildings covered in green neon signage. Rain streaks across the windshield as the vehicle's dashboard glows with purple light, and the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with large-scale holographic advertisements

events.description: massive golden holographic statue becomes visible on the right side of the street
vehicle maintains steady cruising speed through the commercial district

agents.ego_description: cruising at medium speed through the commercial district, passing the large golden holographic display on the right

entered.detail: large glowing golden humanoid figure serving as a three-dimensional advertisement
rectangular commercial sign with red and white illuminated text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a more open intersection within the commercial district, where a massive golden holographic statue dominates the right side of the view. The street widens slightly, revealing more of the night sky between buildings, while the player maintains a steady speed past various neon advertisements and glass office towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with massive white holographic display structure

events.description: passing extremely bright white holographic structure causing significant illumination change
exiting the bright plaza area into a darker street section with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: accelerating past a massive illuminated white hologram while maintaining central lane position, speed increasing significantly

entered.detail: massive bright white and blue three-dimensional holographic advertisement with geometric crystalline shapes
vertical green light beam visible in the distance piercing the night sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes an enormous white holographic structure on the right that bathes the scene in bright light, creating a stark contrast with the dark rainy environment. A distinctive green laser beam becomes visible in the distance ahead, serving as a landmark. The speed continues to increase as the player exits the brightly lit plaza into a darker section of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed arterial road through darker downtown district

events.description: vehicle reaches high velocity, speedometer indicating 80+ km/h
ambient light decreases significantly as vehicle enters darker industrial transition zone

agents.ego_description: high-speed driving through darker urban canyon with minimal neon lighting, maintaining steady acceleration

entered.detail: tall dark structures with minimal window lighting marking the industrial district boundary

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a darker, less illuminated section of the city while maintaining high speed. The green laser beam draws closer, positioned centrally ahead. The architecture shifts from commercial glass towers to darker industrial buildings with fewer lights, creating a more ominous atmosphere as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district approach with construction cranes and warehouses

events.description: vehicle begins decelerating as destination approaches, speedometer decreasing from maximum
entering Coastview district marked by industrial cranes and warehouse structures

agents.ego_description: decelerating while approaching the destination district, navigating toward industrial area with large silhouetted cranes visible ahead

entered.detail: large construction cranes silhouetted against the dark night sky marking the industrial zone

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle slowing down as it approaches the industrial Coastview district. Large construction cranes dominate the skyline ahead, silhouetted against the night. The green laser beam shifts to the right as the vehicle maneuvers toward the destination, with concrete barriers and warehouse buildings becoming prominent in the reduced visibility conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a vehicle as it moves from a claustrophobic neon canyon into a wide, open commercial intersection. It begins by accelerating through a narrow street during a heavy downpour, where rain streaks across the windshield and purple dashboard lights contrast with the green neon signage of towering glass buildings. As the vehicle pushes forward, the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights, guiding the camera through the dense urban corridor. The scene then opens up as the vehicle emerges into a broader intersection, shifting the view from the tight walls of the street to a more expansive night sky. Finally, the perspective glides past a massive golden holographic statue and various glowing advertisements that dominate the widening commercial district.

The shot follows a high-speed drive through a rainy metropolis that transforms from a brilliant commercial plaza into a dark, industrial waterfront. It begins by passing an enormous white holographic structure that bathes the wet streets in bright light, while a distant green laser beam emerges as a focal point ahead. As the vehicle accelerates away from the plaza, the scene shifts into a darker urban corridor where the glass towers give way to ominous industrial buildings and the green laser draws closer. The environment then opens up into the Coastview district, where the vehicle slows down amidst a skyline of silhouetted construction cranes. Finally, the camera maneuvers past concrete barriers and warehouses as the green laser shifts to the right, disappearing into the low-visibility gloom of the industrial zone.
